message:
test(robot): comprehensive CASS injection test suite (ntm-aoxx)

Adds extensive tests for CASS context injection, achieving >80% coverage:
- formatAge: all time-based branches (today, days, weeks, months)
- FilterResults: age filtering, recency boost, CASS score handling
- truncateToTokens: line boundary handling, short/long content
- QueryCASS: disabled config, keyword extraction
- QueryAndFilterCASS: end-to-end flow tests
- InjectContextFromQuery: full integration tests

Also fixes unused import in agentmail/session.go.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
